description: Perform an iterative design sizing exercise to determine the specific rotor radius required to produce 5000 W (+/- 50 W) of mechanical power. The design must utilize a 3-bladed rotor with a constant chord of 0.25 m, zero twist, and a NACA 4412 airfoil (analyzed at Re=1e6, NCrit=9 with 360-degree extrapolation). Evaluate the rotor performance at a rated wind speed of 10 m/s and a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 6. Save the final project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/sized_rotor_5kw.wpa, export the successful BEM simulation result data to /home/ga/Documents/projects/final_simulation.txt, and create a text file at /home/ga/Documents/projects/sizing_result.txt containing the determined radius in the format: 'Final Radius: X.XX m'.
